title: Deploy a Soroban Contract
description: Build, upload, and instantiate a Soroban smart contract on Stellar testnet using StarForge.

steps.title: Check your wallet balance
steps.description: Confirm your deployer wallet has enough XLM to cover upload and instantiation fees.

steps.title: Build the contract
steps.description: Compile your Soroban contract to WASM. Run this from your contract project directory.

steps.title: Validate the WASM
steps.description: Run a dry-run deploy to check WASM size, fees, and that the contract compiles correctly — nothing is broadcast yet.

steps.title: Upload the contract
steps.description: Upload the compiled WASM to the Stellar network. This registers the contract code and returns a WASM hash.

steps.title: Verify on-chain
steps.description: Confirm the deployment succeeded by listing your recent deployments.
